docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00) SERVED JUL-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, GRACE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT GRACE RUIZ IS PRESENT. ON COURT'S OWN MOTION MATTER CONTINUED TO AUGUST 9, 2018 AT 8:30AM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY AUTORETURN RUIZ, GRACE
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, GRACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
